channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 690,000 — Greystone Park: 4-Bed Home on 9,185 m² with Pool & Borehole (Greystone Park, Harare North)
item.description: USD 690,000 — Greystone Park, Harare North. 4 beds, 3 baths. Greystone Park: 4-Bed Home on 9,185 m² with Pool & Borehole. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Property.co.zw
